name: taskplanner
description: AI-directed markdown task management in your repo. Generates AGENTS.md, CLAUDE.md, and .cursorrules workflows. Tracked by git.

interface.shortDescription: AI-directed markdown task management in your repo
interface.longDescription: AI-directed markdown task management in your repo. Uses git-tracked .tasks files and gives Codex tools and skills to read, create, prioritize, plan, update, and move work.
defaultPrompt: Pick the next task and make a plan.
